Upon seeing first enemy: Hello, I am SmackGPT, a combat analysis AI program.
I will be analyzing your fights and providing you with helpful tips.
Here is your first tip: If you run out of Stamina you won't be able to dodge or attack, so manage it carefully!
After killing 5 enemies
Did you know you can perform combos by mixing light and heavy attacks?
After killing 15 enemies
Hitting enemies reduces their Poise. If their Poise is reduced to 0 they will be stunned for a few seconds.
After killing 11 enemies after getting shield
If you parry a melee attack it will greatly reduce the enemy's Poise, potentially stunning them
After dying to Head of IT too much
Combat Analysis: Dave, Head of IT. Beginning Report...
He consistently forgets how to cast his spells and has to look them up on his phone. This is the optimal time to strike.
After dying to Carol too much while her friends are alive
Combat Analysis: Carol, Head of HR. Beginning Report...
She is fueled by the power of friendship and is thus too powerful for you.
Catherine has told you what to say to her friends to ruin their friendships. Try to find them before killing her.
After dying to Frank too much
Combat Analysis: Frank, Head of Accounting. Beginning Report...
When you are far away from him he starts shooting icicles at you that are difficult to dodge. Try staying close to him.
After picking up a new weapon
Different weapons have different attacks and characteristics. Go to the Weapons menu to learn about your weapons.
After picking up a 2nd version of the same weapon type
You have two weapons of the same type. Go to the Weapons menu to choose which one you have equipped.
